EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} removed a TeamPass account on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} locked a TeamPass account on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} unlocked a TeamPass account on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} changed a TeamPass account on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created a TeamPass account on host {event_src.host}
